description_long: This is a white ceramic cup with a large, rounded handle and a smooth cylindrical body. The exterior is decorated with a pastel pink panel featuring playful, cartoon-style artwork of two characters sitting together, surrounded by hearts, flowers, and stars. On one side, there is a Spanish phrase in bold white text: 'Tomar jugito sabe mejor contigo uwu <3', which translates to 'Drinking juice tastes better with you uwu <3'. The cup's surface is glossy and reflects light, giving it a polished appearance. The interior is plain white, and the handle is ergonomically shaped for easy gripping. The overall design is cheerful and whimsical, making it suitable for casual, friendly environments.
description: A glossy white ceramic cup with a pink panel, featuring cute cartoon characters, decorative motifs, and a Spanish phrase in white text.
description_view_0: This view shows the handle on the right and the Spanish phrase 'Tomar jugito sabe mejor contigo uwu <3' in bold white text on a pink background.
description_view_1: This view highlights the left side of the cup, showing part of the handle and a cartoon character with flowers and hearts.
description_view_2: This view centers on the front, displaying two cartoon characters sitting together, surrounded by decorative motifs on the pink panel.
description_view_3: This view shows the handle on the left and the end of the Spanish phrase, with stars and part of a cartoon character visible.
